title: Register Cabinet organ map and Gemini proposed role
goal: Update Cabinet-facing registry expectations so Gemini is represented as proposal-only review/scout capacity and the Ecosystem Registry Map remains the canonical orientation surface.

metadata.safety_boundary: gated design and registration only; no dispatch, merge, runtime mutation, credential exposure or automatic queue mutation

acceptance.assertion: Cabinet registry or planning docs represent Gemini as proposal-only and explicitly forbid push, merge, runtime mutation and credential context.
README.md and AGENTS.md continue to expose the Ecosystem Registry Map prominently for agents.
The rendered ecosystem registry map is regenerated or a blocked reason is recorded.
The update states that Mermaid maps are orientation surfaces, not proof or authority.
Cabinet represents Gemini as proposed proposal-only capacity, not as verified or schedulable capacity.
